evals.prompt: Create a compact Blender production plan for a Godot medieval street kit with grid-snapped walls, corners, doors, roofs, LODs, collision, and reusable PBR materials.
evals.expected_output: Defines measurable dimensions, pivots, grid, silhouette and surface targets, geometry and material budgets, LOD and collision contracts, glTF delivery, and a clean Godot acceptance scene.
assertions: The modular contract covers scale, origin, pivots, snap dimensions, variants, UVs, materials, LODs, and collision
A representative kit slice is freshly exported and verified in Godot before full production

evals.prompt: Plan and verify a Blender humanoid rig with idle, walk, run, attack, hit, and death clips for Godot, including loop seams, root motion, and retargeting.
evals.expected_output: Locks a minimal skeleton and deformation contract, tests weights and extreme poses, defines named action ranges and motion policy, and verifies retargeted clips in Godot.
assertions: Rig hierarchy, deform bones, weights, actions, loop contacts, root motion, and transitions are explicit
Fresh glTF import verifies rest pose, mapping, scale, orientation, every representative clip, and game-speed playback

evals.prompt: Audit a Blender asset that imports into Godot at the wrong scale with invisible faces, flat materials, and only one of four animations.
evals.expected_output: Traces source transforms, axes, normals and backfaces, glTF material compatibility, action export, and Godot import settings, then repeats a clean export and import.
assertions: Scale, orientation, normals, backface culling, materials, Actions, and importer configuration are inspected from evidence
The result is verified through a fresh artifact and clean Godot import rather than cached editor state

evals.prompt: Build an acceptance plan for a stylized quadruped creature with facial shape keys, extreme joint deformation, two LODs, and a mobile Godot target.
evals.expected_output: Turns style and deformation goals into camera-aware criteria, mesh and texture budgets, topology and weight tests, shape-key export checks, LOD acceptance, and mobile profiling.
assertions: Silhouette, topology, weights, shape keys, materials, LODs, and mobile budgets are measurable
Extreme poses and clean Godot imports are tested under representative camera, lighting, animation, and device conditions

evals.prompt: Use our finished modular meshes to design the dungeon flow, infiltration routes, landmarks, encounters, checkpoints, and navigation in Godot.
evals.expected_output: Should prefer godot-level-designer because spatial composition and playability are primary and the assets already exist.

evals.prompt: Implement the Godot AnimationTree state machine, input-driven blends, root-motion movement, and runtime regression tests for imported clips.
evals.expected_output: Should prefer godot-game-creation-engineer because runtime engine integration is primary.

evals.prompt: Create the visual direction, typography, color tokens, and responsive components for a game studio website.
evals.expected_output: Should prefer design-engineer because web visual direction and UI implementation are primary.
